gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Edit" icon on the far right of the newly created milestone
Then the user should see a popup window titled "Adjust Milestone"
And the user should see the current milestone details filled in
When the user clicks on the timestamp toggle button within the "Adjust Milestone" dialog
And the user clicks on the calendar button within the "Adjust Milestone" dialog
And the user picks the date "June 12 2024" from the calendar
And the user clicks on the calendar button again within the "Adjust Milestone" dialog
And the user clicks the "Submit" button within the "Adjust Milestone" dialog
Then the popup window should disappear
And the user should see a green success message saying "Adjust Milestone Success"

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Edit" icon on the far right of the newly created milestone

*Then* the user should see a popup window titled "Adjust Milestone"

*And* the user clicks on the calendar button again within the "Adjust Milestone" dialog

*And* the user clicks the "Submit" button within the "Adjust Milestone" dialog
steps.result:
*Then* the popup window should disappear

*And* the user should see a green success message saying "Adjust Milestone Success"
